name: Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. The night before:
1. Tear lettuce leaves, wash well, dry thoroughly, and chill in the refrigerator.
2. Crush garlic clove and place it in a cup with olive oil. Chill in the refrigerator.
2. That day:
3. Strain the garlic-flavored olive oil into a separate container.
4. Remove crusts from French bread, cut into cubes, and fry in 1/4 cup of the olive oil until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
5. In the jar with remaining oil, add cayenne pepper, Tabasco sauce, anchovies, salt, and black pepper.
6. Break chilled romaine leaves into pieces and place them in a large bowl.
7. Sprinkle the bowl with additional salt and black pepper.
8. Pour the olive oil mixture over the salad and mix thoroughly so that every leaf is coated.
9. Boil an egg for about 1 minute, remove it, peel the shell, and add to the salad.
10. Squeeze lemon juice over the egg and gently stir into the salad.
11. Just before serving, sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the salad and add croutons.
Serve with garlic bread.
